title: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - 211info
text: POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DALLAS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient treatment for substance use disorder. Services may include a drug and alcohol assessment, individual counseling, treatment groups, peer support services, and referrals to higher levels of care, such as detox and residential services. Also offers treatment for a DUII conviction referred by the courts. 182 SW Academy Street Suite 333 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Ages 12 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 623-9289 .... Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-9289 Mark Davis [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees also available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Polk County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTH AND FAMILY MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - POLK CARES CENTER MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
